quality.rationale: 需结合协变导数性质与正交标架保持条件推导张量反对称性，并结合四速度条件得出加速度耦合项，逻辑链完整且具实际参考系构建背景

origin.question: Problem 7.17. Consider an observer with 4-velocity $\mathbf{u}$ who transports his four basis vectors $\mathbf{e}_{\alpha}$ along with him according to the transport law $\nabla_{\mathbf{u}}\mathbf{e}_{\alpha} = \mathbf{A}_{\alpha}^{\beta}\mathbf{e}_{\beta}$ . What is the most general form of $\mathbf{A}_{\alpha}^{\beta}$ if:\n(ii) in addition $\mathbf{e}_{\hat{\mathbf{o}}} = \mathbf{u}$ ? (i.e. the frame is his rest-frame).
origin.answer: $A_{\\hat{\\alpha}}{}^{\\hat{\\beta}} = u^{\\hat{\\beta}} a_{\\hat{\\alpha}} - a^{\\hat{\\beta}} u_{\\hat{\\alpha}} + \\omega_{\\hat{\\alpha}}{}^{\\hat{\\beta}}$, 其中 $\\omega_{\\hat{\\alpha}\\hat{\\beta}} = -\\omega_{\\hat{\\beta}\\hat{\\alpha}}$ 且仅含空间分量
